title: FinOps for LLMs — Unit Economics and Multi-Tenant Attribution

questions.question: Why does traditional FinOps break on LLM spend?
questions.question_zh: 为什么传统 FinOps 在 LLM 支出上失效？
options: Costs are token-transactions rather than resource-uptime; tags don't auto-propagate from API calls and you must stamp user/task/tenant at the call site
options_zh: 云服务商拒绝提供明细
成本是 token 交易而非资源运行时长；标签不会从 API 调用自动传播，你必须在调用处标记用户/任务/租户

questions.question: Which three attribution dimensions does the lesson require instrumenting on day one?
questions.question_zh: 课程要求在第一天就对哪三个归因维度进行埋点？
options_zh: 按用户（user_id）、按任务（task_id + route）、按租户（tenant_id）

questions.question: Which four token layers should be broken out in cost attribution?
questions.question_zh: 在成本归因中应该拆分哪四个 token 层？
options_zh: 缓存、模型、网关、可观测性

questions.question: What is the kill-switch trigger in the enforcement ladder?
questions.question_zh: enforcement ladder 中的 kill-switch 触发条件是什么？
options: Tenant spend z-score > 4 relative to baseline; auto-pause tenant and page on-call
options_zh: 租户消费 z-score > 4（相对基线）；自动暂停租户并呼叫值班人员

questions.question: Which unit metric does the lesson recommend instead of $/M tokens?
questions.question_zh: 课程推荐用哪个单位指标来替代 $/M tokens？
options: Cost per product outcome (e.g. cost per resolved support ticket, cost per generated article, cost per successful agent task)
options_zh: 每产品结果成本（如每解决一个支持工单的成本、每生成一篇文章的成本、每成功完成一个 agent 任务的成本）

questions.question: Which attribution pattern does the lesson call the highest-accuracy one mature teams use?
questions.question_zh: 课程中提到，成熟团队使用的最高精度归因模式是哪一种？
options: Telemetry joiner — join traces to billing via trace IDs
options_zh: 遥测连接器——通过 trace ID 将 trace 与账单关联
